message:
fix: resolve 5 frontend/backend bugs (#5467, #5468, #5469, #5470, #5471) (#5473)

- Use stable composite key (cluster/object/lastSeen/reason) for event
  rows instead of index-based keys that cause React state reuse (#5467)
- Implement real timestamp comparator for Event Stream "Time" sort
  instead of the no-op that always returned 0 (#5468)
- Replace truncated 100-notification ownership check with a single
  UPDATE ... WHERE id AND user_id query so any notification can be
  marked read (#5469)
- Add isLocalhostURL validation and slog.Warn when BACKEND_URL is
  missing in non-local deployments to surface OAuth misconfiguration
  (#5470)
- Detect target repo's default branch from fork response instead of
  hardcoding "main" for HEAD SHA lookup and PR base (#5471)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -80,6 +80,7 @@ type Store interface {
 	GetUserNotifications(userID uuid.UUID, limit int) ([]models.Notification, error)
 	GetUnreadNotificationCount(userID uuid.UUID) (int, error)
 	MarkNotificationRead(id uuid.UUID) error
+	MarkNotificationReadByUser(id uuid.UUID, userID uuid.UUID) error
 	MarkAllNotificationsRead(userID uuid.UUID) error
 
 	// GPU Reservations
